questions.question: She ____ a book for two hours.
questions.explanation: 'For two hours' (দুই ঘণ্টা ধরে) সময়ের উল্লেখ থাকায় এটি Present Perfect Continuous। 'She' এর পর 'has been' এবং verb-এর সাথে 'ing' যুক্ত হয়।

questions.question: They ____ football since morning.
questions.explanation: 'Since morning' (সকাল থেকে) নির্দিষ্ট সময়ের উল্লেখ থাকায় Present Perfect Continuous Tense হবে। 'They' plural subject, তাই 'have been playing'।

questions.question: I ____ for the exam since last night.
questions.explanation: অতীত থেকে শুরু হয়ে বর্তমানেও চলমান কাজ (since last night) বোঝাতে Present Perfect Continuous হয়। 'I' এর সাথে 'have been studying' বসে।

questions.question: He ____ in this company for five years.
questions.explanation: পাঁচ বছর ধরে কাজ করছে — দীর্ঘ সময় ধরে চলমান কাজ। 'He' third person singular, তাই 'has been working' বসবে।

questions.question: The children ____ in the rain for an hour.
questions.explanation: 'The children' plural subject এবং 'for an hour' সময়ের উল্লেখ আছে। তাই Present Perfect Continuous গঠনে 'have been playing' সঠিক।

questions.question: My mother ____ dinner in the kitchen all evening.
questions.explanation: 'All evening' (সারা সন্ধ্যা ধরে) দীর্ঘ সময়ের চলমান কাজ নির্দেশ করে। 'My mother' singular, তাই 'has been cooking' হবে।

questions.question: We ____ a movie for thirty minutes.
questions.explanation: 'For thirty minutes' নির্দিষ্ট সময়ব্যাপ্তি বোঝায়। 'We' plural subject, তাই 'have been watching' বসেছে।

questions.question: The baby ____ for an hour.
questions.explanation: 'For an hour' ধরে শিশুটি কাঁদছে — Present Perfect Continuous। 'The baby' singular subject, তাই 'has been crying'।

questions.question: You ____ on the phone for a long time.
questions.explanation: দীর্ঘ সময় ধরে কথা বলা বোঝাচ্ছে (for a long time)। 'You' এর সাথে 'have been talking' বসে।

questions.question: It ____ since yesterday.
questions.explanation: গতকাল থেকে বৃষ্টি হচ্ছে — Present Perfect Continuous। 'It' এর সাথে 'has been' এবং 'rain-ing' বসবে।

questions.question: The students ____ to the lecture since 10 AM.
questions.explanation: সকাল ১০টা থেকে ছাত্ররা লেকচার শুনছে। 'The students' plural, তাই 'have been listening' সঠিক।

questions.question: He ____ a letter for thirty minutes.
questions.explanation: ৩০ মিনিট ধরে চিঠি লিখছে। 'He' singular subject, তাই 'has been writing' সঠিক।

questions.question: They ____ this bridge for two years.
questions.explanation: দুই বছর ধরে ব্রিজটি তৈরি করছে। 'They' plural, তাই Present Perfect Continuous গঠনে 'have been building' বসে।

questions.question: I ____ for my keys all morning.
questions.explanation: সারা সকাল ধরে চাবি খুঁজছি। দীর্ঘস্থায়ী কাজ বোঝাতে 'I' এর সাথে 'have been looking' ব্যবহৃত হয়।

questions.question: She ____ a red dress lately.
questions.explanation: 'Lately' (সাম্প্রতিক সময়ে) চলমান অভ্যাস বা কাজ বোঝাতে সাধারণত Present Perfect Continuous Tense হয়। 'She has been wearing' সঠিক।

questions.question: The birds ____ in the trees since sunrise.
questions.explanation: সূর্যোদয় থেকে পাখিগুলো ডাকছে। Plural subject 'The birds' এর সাথে 'have been singing' বসবে।

questions.question: We ____ for the bus since 9 o'clock.
questions.explanation: ৯টা থেকে আমরা বাসের জন্য অপেক্ষা করছি। 'Since' নির্দিষ্ট শুরু নির্দেশ করে। 'We' এর সাথে 'have been waiting' সঠিক।

questions.question: He ____ his room all day.
questions.explanation: 'All day' (সারা দিন ধরে) কাজ চলা বোঝাচ্ছে — Present Perfect Continuous। 'He' singular, তাই 'has been cleaning'।

questions.question: The dog ____ in the garden for hours.
questions.explanation: কয়েক ঘণ্টা ধরে কুকুরটি বাগানে দৌড়াচ্ছে। 'The dog' singular, তাই 'has been running' (run-এর n ডাবল হবে)।

questions.question: I ____ dinner for our guests since afternoon.
questions.explanation: বিকাল থেকে মেহমানদের জন্য রাতের খাবার তৈরি করছি। 'Since afternoon' নির্দেশ করে কাজটি আগে শুরু হয়ে এখনও চলছে। 'I have been preparing' সঠিক।

questions.question: She ____ to different cities recently.
questions.explanation: 'Recently' বা সাম্প্রতিককালে বারবার বা চলমান কাজ বোঝাতে Present Perfect Continuous ব্যবহৃত হয়। 'She has been travelling'।

questions.question: They ____ a surprise party for days.
questions.explanation: বেশ কয়েক দিন ধরে সারপ্রাইজ পার্টির পরিকল্পনা করছে। 'They' plural এবং সময়ের স্থায়ী ভাব বোঝাতে 'have been planning' হবে।

questions.question: He ____ hard to improve his grades lately.
questions.explanation: 'Lately' সাম্প্রতিক সময়ের কোনো দীর্ঘস্থায়ী প্রয়াস বোঝায়। 'He' singular subject, তাই 'has been working' সঠিক।

questions.question: You ____ too much noise all day. Please stop.
questions.explanation: সারা দিন ধরে গোলমাল করছ — বিরক্তিকর চলমান কাজ বোঝাতে 'have been making' (Present Perfect Continuous) ব্যবহৃত হয়।

questions.question: The company ____ new employees for months.
questions.explanation: কয়েক মাস ধরে কোম্পানি নতুন কর্মী নিয়োগ দিচ্ছে। 'The company' singular subject, তাই 'has been hiring' সঠিক।

questions.question: I ____ progress in English since I joined this class.
questions.explanation: 'Since I joined' অতীত সময়ের সূচনা নির্দেশ করে। তখন থেকে উন্নতি হচ্ছে বোঝাতে 'I have been making' ব্যবহৃত হয়।

questions.question: She ____ for her exams all week.
questions.explanation: সারা সপ্তাহ ধরে পরীক্ষার প্রস্তুতি নিচ্ছে — দীর্ঘ সময় চলমান প্রক্রিয়া। 'She has been preparing' সঠিক।

questions.question: The world's climate ____ rapidly for decades.
questions.explanation: দশক ধরে জলবায়ু দ্রুত পরিবর্তিত হচ্ছে। ধারাবাহিক ও দীর্ঘমেয়াদী পরিবর্তন বোঝাতে Present Perfect Continuous 'has been changing' সঠিক।

questions.question: He ____ more and more impatient lately.
questions.explanation: সাম্প্রতিক সময়ে ক্রমান্বয়ে অধৈর্য হয়ে উঠছে। 'He has been getting' ক্রমাগত ও ক্রমান্বয়িক পরিবর্তন নির্দেশ করে।

questions.question: I ____ this book since yesterday.
questions.explanation: গতকাল থেকে আমি বইটি পড়ছি (পড়া এখনও শেষ হয়নি)। 'I' এর সাথে 'have been reading' সঠিক।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'She has been reading a book for an hour.'
questions.explanation: 'has been reading' এবং 'for an hour' — এটি Present Perfect Continuous Tense-এর নিখুঁত গঠন।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'They have been playing football since 4 PM.'
questions.explanation: 'have been playing' এবং শুরুর সময়ের উল্লেখ ('since 4 PM') — এটি Present Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'I have been studying for my exam all morning.'
questions.explanation: 'have been studying' ও দীর্ঘ সময়সূচক বাক্য 'all morning' — এটি Present Perfect Continuous নির্দেশ করে।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'He has been going to the gym lately.'
questions.explanation: 'has been going' এবং 'lately' সাম্প্রতিক সময়ের চলমান অভ্যাস বোঝায়। এটি Present Perfect Continuous Tense।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'The baby has been crying for thirty minutes.'
questions.explanation: 'has been crying' এবং সময়ব্যাপ্তি 'for thirty minutes' — এটি Present Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'We have been watching a movie since afternoon.'
questions.explanation: 'have been watching' এবং 'since afternoon' অতীতের শুরু থেকে বর্তমান পর্যন্ত চলমান কাজ নির্দেশ করায় এটি Present Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'It has been raining outside all day.'
questions.explanation: সারা দিন ধরে বাইরে বৃষ্টি হচ্ছে — 'has been raining' (subject + has been + verb-ing) দ্বারা এটি Present Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'The students have been listening to the teacher since morning.'
questions.explanation: 'have been listening' এবং 'since morning' — সকাল থেকে ছাত্ররা শিক্ষকের কথা শুনছে, তাই এটি Present Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'She has been wearing this dress since morning.'
questions.explanation: পোশাকটি সকাল থেকে পরা হয়েছে এবং এখনও পরে আছে। 'has been wearing' দ্বারা এটি Present Perfect Continuous Tense।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'I have been meeting new people lately.'
questions.explanation: সাম্প্রতিক সময়ে চলমান অভিজ্ঞতা বা আচরণ বোঝাতে 'have been meeting' ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে — এটি Present Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Arrange: (for / has / she / been / reading / hours / two)
options: She has been reading for two hours.
She reading has been for two hours.
She has been for two hours reading.
She has reading been for two hours.
questions.correctAnswer: She has been reading for two hours.
questions.explanation: সঠিক ক্রম: Subject (She) + has + been + verb-ing (reading) + time duration (for two hours)।

questions.question: Arrange: (playing / they / have / football / since / been / morning)
options: They have been playing football since morning.
They playing have been football since morning.
They have playing been football since morning.
They have been football playing since morning.
questions.correctAnswer: They have been playing football since morning.
questions.explanation: সঠিক গঠন: Subject (They) + have been + verb-ing (playing) + Object (football) + time (since morning)।

questions.question: Arrange: (waiting / I / for / have / been / the / bus / since / 10 AM)
options: I have been waiting for the bus since 10 AM.
I waiting have been for the bus since 10 AM.
Have I been waiting for the bus since 10 AM.
I have been for the bus waiting since 10 AM.
questions.correctAnswer: I have been waiting for the bus since 10 AM.
questions.explanation: সঠিক ক্রম: Subject (I) + have been + verb-ing (waiting) + prepositional object (for the bus) + starting time (since 10 AM)।

questions.question: Arrange: (kitchen / has / mother / been / cooking / in / the / my / all morning)
options: My mother has been cooking in the kitchen all morning.
My mother cooking has been in the kitchen all morning.
My mother has been in the kitchen cooking all morning.
Has my mother been cooking in the kitchen all morning.
questions.correctAnswer: My mother has been cooking in the kitchen all morning.
questions.explanation: সঠিক গঠন: Subject (My mother) + has been + verb-ing (cooking) + place (in the kitchen) + duration (all morning)।

questions.question: Arrange: (all day / they / a / planning / party / been / have)
options: They have been planning a party all day.
They planning have been a party all day.
They have planning been a party all day.
All day they planning have been a party.
questions.correctAnswer: They have been planning a party all day.
questions.explanation: সঠিক ক্রম: Subject (They) + have been + verb-ing (planning) + Object (a party) + duration (all day)।

questions.question: Arrange: (changing / climate / has / the / been / rapidly / for decades)
options: The climate has been changing rapidly for decades.
The climate changing has been rapidly for decades.
The climate has been rapidly changing for decades.
Has the climate been changing rapidly for decades.
questions.correctAnswer: The climate has been changing rapidly for decades.
questions.explanation: সঠিক ক্রম: Subject (The climate) + has been + verb-ing (changing) + adverb (rapidly) + duration (for decades)।

questions.question: Find the error: 'She have been reading a book.'
options: She has been reading a book.
She is been reading a book.
She has been read a book.
questions.correctAnswer: She has been reading a book.
questions.explanation: 'She' third person singular subject, তাই 'have' নয় — 'has' হবে। সঠিক রূপ: 'She has been reading'।

questions.question: Find the error: 'They has been playing football.'
questions.explanation: 'They' plural subject, তাই 'has' এর জায়গায় 'have' ব্যবহৃত হবে। সঠিক বাক্য: 'They have been playing football.'

questions.question: Find the error: 'I is been studying for my exam.'
options: I have been studying for my exam.
I am studying for my exam.
I have studying for my exam.
I has been studying for my exam.
questions.correctAnswer: I have been studying for my exam.
questions.explanation: 'I' এর সাথে Present Perfect Continuous-এ 'have been' ব্যবহৃত হয়, 'is been' নয়।

questions.question: Find the error: 'He has been go to school since Monday.'
options: He has been going to school since Monday.
He is going to school since Monday.
He has go to school since Monday.
He goes to school since Monday.
questions.correctAnswer: He has been going to school since Monday.
questions.explanation: Present Perfect Continuous-এ auxiliary 'been' এর পর verb-এর সাথে 'ing' যুক্ত করা আবশ্যক। 'go' → 'going' হবে।

questions.question: Find the error: 'The children has been playing in the park.'
options: The children have been playing in the park.
The children are playing in the park.
The children has playing in the park.
The children have playing in the park.
questions.correctAnswer: The children have been playing in the park.
questions.explanation: 'The children' একটি plural noun, তাই singular 'has' এর জায়গায় plural auxiliary 'have' বসবে।

questions.question: Find the error: 'We is been watching a movie.'
options: We have been watching a movie.
We has been watching a movie.
questions.correctAnswer: We have been watching a movie.
questions.explanation: 'We' plural subject এর সাথে 'is been' হয় না, সঠিক রূপ হলো 'have been watching'।

questions.question: Find the error: 'It has being raining all day.'
options: It has been raining all day.
It have been raining all day.
questions.correctAnswer: It has been raining all day.
questions.explanation: গঠন অনুযায়ী 'has' এর পরে 'being' নয়, 'been' বসবে (subject + have/has + been + verb-ing)।

questions.question: Find the error: 'She has been swiming for an hour.'
options: She has been swimming for an hour.
She has been swim for an hour.
She is swimming for an hour.
She have been swimming for an hour.
questions.correctAnswer: She has been swimming for an hour.
questions.explanation: বানানগত ভুল: 'swim' এর শেষে consonant-vowel-consonant (CVC) থাকায় 'ing' যোগ করার সময় m ডাবল হয়ে 'swimming' হবে। 'swiming' ভুল।

questions.question: Find the error: 'He has been writeing a letter.'
options: He has been writing a letter.
He has been write a letter.
He have been writing a letter.
questions.correctAnswer: He has been writing a letter.
questions.explanation: বানানগত ভুল: 'write' এর শেষে silent 'e' আছে, তাই 'ing' যুক্ত করার সময় 'e' বাদ গিয়ে 'writing' হবে। 'writeing' ভুল বানান।

questions.question: Find the error: 'They are been making a lot of noise.'
options: They have been making a lot of noise.
They has been making a lot of noise.
They are making a lot of noise.
They been making a lot of noise.
questions.correctAnswer: They have been making a lot of noise.
questions.explanation: 'are been' বলে কোনো ব্যাকরণগত গঠন নেই। দীর্ঘ সময় ধরে গোলমাল করা বোঝাতে Present Perfect Continuous-এ 'have been making' হবে।

questions.question: Translate: 'সে দুই ঘণ্টা ধরে একটি বই পড়ছে।'
options: She has been reading a book for two hours.
She is reading a book for two hours.
She reads a book for two hours.
She has read a book for two hours.
questions.correctAnswer: She has been reading a book for two hours.
questions.explanation: 'দুই ঘণ্টা ধরে' সময়ের ব্যাপ্তি (for two hours) বোঝায়, তাই Present Perfect Continuous হবে। 'She has been reading' সঠিক।

questions.question: Translate: 'তারা সকাল থেকে ফুটবল খেলছে।'
options: They have been playing football since morning.
They are playing football since morning.
They have played football since morning.
questions.correctAnswer: They have been playing football since morning.
questions.explanation: 'সকাল থেকে' শুরুর সময় নির্দিষ্ট করে বলা হয়েছে (since morning)। তাই Present Perfect Continuous-এ 'They have been playing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Translate: 'আমি সকাল থেকে পড়াশোনা করছি।'
options: I have been studying since morning.
questions.correctAnswer: I have been studying since morning.
questions.explanation: সকাল থেকে চলমান কাজ — Present Perfect Continuous। 'I' এর সাথে 'have been studying since morning' বসবে।

questions.question: Translate: 'সকাল থেকে বৃষ্টি হচ্ছে।'
options: It has been raining since morning.
questions.correctAnswer: It has been raining since morning.
questions.explanation: আবহাওয়ার দীর্ঘস্থায়ী চলমান অবস্থা (সকাল থেকে শুরু) বোঝাতে Present Perfect Continuous ব্যবহৃত হয়। সঠিক রূপ: 'It has been raining since morning.'

questions.question: Translate: 'আমার মা সকাল থেকে রান্না করছেন।'
options: My mother has been cooking since morning.
My mother is cooking since morning.
My mother has cooked since morning.
questions.correctAnswer: My mother has been cooking since morning.
questions.explanation: অতীত থেকে শুরু হয়ে এখনও রান্না চলছে — Present Perfect Continuous। 'My mother' singular, তাই 'has been cooking' হবে।

questions.question: Translate: 'আমরা এক ঘণ্টা ধরে সিনেমা দেখছি।'
options: We have been watching a movie for an hour.
We are watching a movie for an hour.
We watch a movie for an hour.
We have watched a movie for an hour.
questions.correctAnswer: We have been watching a movie for an hour.
questions.explanation: এক ঘণ্টা ধরে (for an hour) সিনেমা দেখার চলমান প্রক্রিয়া। 'We' plural, তাই 'have been watching' সঠিক অনুবাদ।

questions.question: Translate: 'সে কয়েক দিন ধরে পরীক্ষার প্রস্তুতি নিচ্ছে।'
options: She has been preparing for exams for a few days.
She is preparing for exams for a few days.
She prepares for exams for a few days.
She has prepared for exams for a few days.
questions.correctAnswer: She has been preparing for exams for a few days.
questions.explanation: 'কয়েক দিন ধরে' (for a few days) চলমান প্রস্তুতি — Present Perfect Continuous। 'She has been preparing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Translate: 'আবহাওয়া অনেক বছর ধরে পরিবর্তিত হচ্ছে।'
options: The weather has been changing for many years.
The weather is changing for many years.
The weather changes for many years.
The weather has changed for many years.
questions.correctAnswer: The weather has been changing for many years.
questions.explanation: দীর্ঘ বছর ধরে ঘটে চলা আবহাওয়ার পরিবর্তন — Present Perfect Continuous। 'The weather' singular, তাই 'has been changing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Translate: 'আমি এক মাস ধরে ইংরেজি শিখছি।'
options: I have been learning English for a month.
I am learning English for a month.
I learn English for a month.
I have learned English for a month.
questions.correctAnswer: I have been learning English for a month.
questions.explanation: এক মাস ধরে চলমান কাজ — Present Perfect Continuous। 'I' এর সাথে 'have been learning' বসবে।

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence:
options: She has been reading a book since 2 PM.
She is reading a book since 2 PM.
She has reading a book since 2 PM.
She reading a book since 2 PM.
questions.correctAnswer: She has been reading a book since 2 PM.
questions.explanation: Quick: Present Perfect Continuous = subject + have/has + been + verb-ing। 'since' এর সাথে নির্দিষ্ট সময় বসে।

questions.question: Choose the correct form: 'They ____ football for hours.'
questions.explanation: Quick: 'They' plural, তাই 'have been' এবং 'for hours' এর সাথে verb-ing 'playing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Pick the correct negative: 'She ____ her homework for an hour.'
questions.explanation: Quick: Present Perfect Continuous negative = subject + have/has + not + been + verb-ing। 'She has not been doing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Pick the correct question form: '____ he been writing for an hour?'
questions.explanation: Quick: Present Perfect Continuous question = Have/Has + subject + been + verb-ing? 'He' এর সাথে 'Has' বসে।

questions.question: Which sentence shows an action continuing from the past?
options: I have been living here for ten years.
I lived here ten years ago.
questions.correctAnswer: I have been living here for ten years.
questions.explanation: Quick: 'for ten years' এবং 'have been living' নির্দেশ করে অতীতে শুরু হওয়া বসবাস এখনও চলছে।

questions.question: Choose the correct verb: 'The baby ____ since morning.'
questions.explanation: Quick: 'The baby' singular + 'since morning' সময় নির্দেশক → 'has been crying' (Present Perfect Continuous)।

questions.question: Which sentence is grammatically correct (for vs since)?
options: I have been waiting for two hours.
I have been waiting since two hours.
I am waiting since two hours.
I have waiting for two hours.
questions.correctAnswer: I have been waiting for two hours.
questions.explanation: Quick: সময়ের পরিমাপ বা ব্যাপ্তির পূর্বে 'for' বসে, 'since' নয়। তাই 'for two hours' সঠিক।

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence with 'since':
options: He has been working since Monday.
He has been working for Monday.
questions.correctAnswer: He has been working since Monday.
questions.explanation: নির্দিষ্ট শুরুর দিন বা সময়ের আগে 'since' বসে। 'since Monday' এবং Present Perfect Continuous গঠন অনুযায়ী প্রথম বাক্যটি সঠিক।

questions.question: Which sentence is grammatically correct?
options: She has been swimming in the pool.
She has been swiming in the pool.
She have been swimming in the pool.
She has been swim in the pool.
questions.correctAnswer: She has been swimming in the pool.
questions.explanation: Quick: 'swim' এর সঠিক V-ing রূপ হলো 'swimming' (double m)। 'She' এর সাথে 'has been swimming' সঠিক।
